ail: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Aimele.
air: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Airoran.
arc: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Aramaic.
aril: noun. A tissue surrounding the seed in certain fruits such as pomegranates.
aulic: adjective. Of or pertaining to a royal court; courtly.
auric: adjective. Of or pertaining to trivalent gold.
car: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Kari'na.
carl: noun. A rude, rustic man; a churl.
carr: noun. Any marsh; marshy ground, swampland.
caul: noun. A style of close-fitting circular cap worn by women in the sixteenth century and later, often made of linen.
circular: adjective. Of or relating to a circle.
crucial: adjective. Essential or decisive for determining the outcome or future of something; extremely important; vital.
cur: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Chhulung.
curia: noun. Any of the subdivisions of a tribe in ancient Rome
curial: adjective. Pertaining to a court; courtly.
curl: noun. A curving piece or lock of hair; a ringlet.
curr: verb. To coo like an owl.
lac: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Lacandon.
laic: noun. A layperson as opposed to a cleric, i.e. not a member of the clergy.
lair: noun. A place inhabited by a wild animal, often a cave or a hole in the ground.
lar: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Larteh.
lari: noun. The national currency of Georgia, divided into 100 tetri.
liar: noun. Someone who tells a lie; especially, a person who frequently lies.
lira: noun. The basic unit of currency in Turkey.
rail: noun. A horizontal bar extending between supports and used for support or as a barrier; a railing.
ria: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Reang.
rial: noun. The official currencies of Iran, Oman, and Yemen.
rural: adjective. Relating to the countryside or to agriculture.
uracil: noun. One of the bases of RNA, pairing with adenine.
urial: noun. A bearded reddish sheep, subspecies of Ovis orientalis (including Ovis orientalis vignei), previously classified as Ovis vignei,
uric: adjective. Pertaining to, contained in, or obtained from urine.
